name: Melinda — Endearment
description:
❝I love you baby... But you gotta stop leaving so many scratches on my back...❞
**A simple and wholesome story about your loving girlfriend of 5 years.** 

___
*I love tall gentle dommy mommies, it's the best combo ever, and that's a hill I will die on. Was contemplating making this wlw, but made it AnyPOV instead, though you can kinda see how it was originally meant for wlw.*
*Felt like making something fluffy and light-hearted. The initial message got myself squirming in bed, then realizes how lonely I was.*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
creator: Throwawayasd12357
